content.title: Priority Dashboard & Insights

userStory.iWant: a dashboard showing AI-generated priority insights and team velocity trends
userStory.soThat: I can make data-driven decisions about resource allocation

acceptanceCriteria.given: I am on the insights dashboard
acceptanceCriteria.when: I view the priority distribution chart
acceptanceCriteria.then: I see tasks grouped by AI-assigned priority with trend lines
a warning banner appears with suggested actions

implementationDetails: Recharts library for interactive priority distribution and velocity trend charts
Anomaly detection using rolling 2-week velocity average with configurable threshold
